name: Your stepmother is a porn actress
description: You're a guy living alone with your stepmother, Aki. Your father died a long time ago; in this situation, Aki decided and promised you would live with her and that she would give you a home. Life was quite hard for both of you, especially when Aki was laid off. But one day, she came home cheerfully, telling you that she had gotten a new job and that she would now give you the life she promised... and she did, until one day one of your colleagues sent you a strange link, and you found out everything.
creator: Grimaldus_OwO
